title: Status line opt-in při auto instalaci
goal: In the auto (non-TTY global install) branch of runPostinstall, stop silently editing ~/.claude/settings.json — the status line becomes opt-in — and print an honest summary of which slash commands were created plus a one-line full-removal hint.

steps.title: Drop silent status-line write in auto branch
steps.detail: In runPostinstall, the auto (non-TTY global) branch no longer calls offerStatusline with forced confirm; ~/.claude/settings.json stays untouched. The interactive postinstall path still offers the status line as before.

steps.title: Print honest install summary + removal hint
steps.detail: After writing the commands in the auto branch, print what was created (count + ~/.claude/commands/mini/), note the status line is optional/not enabled, and a one-line full-removal hint (npm uninstall -g mini-orchestrator + remove the commands dir).

steps.title: Update postinstall tests for opt-in status line
steps.detail: Global non-interactive install writes the commands but no longer touches settings.json; assert no statusLine is written; the foreign-status-line test stays consistent.

steps.title: Verify: typecheck, tests, simulated global install
steps.detail: npm run typecheck and npm test green; simulate npm_config_global=true non-interactive run -> commands created, settings.json absent, summary printed.

autoCommit.subject: Phase 110: Status line opt-in při auto instalaci
